name: testblox
description: TestBlox - no-code test automation with Git integration

scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('dist', '../renderer', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run write-build-config && electron-builder --win && node scripts/copy-release-exe.js
scripts.build:dir: npm run build:frontend && npm run write-build-config && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.build:custom: npm run build:frontend && node scripts/write-build-config.js --flavor=custom && electron-builder --win && node scripts/copy-release-exe.js
scripts.build:custom:dir: npm run build:frontend && node scripts/write-build-config.js --flavor=custom && electron-builder --win --dir
